description: D28B-013 acceptance #2: peak RSS regression gate baseline. Populated by main-branch bench.yml runs (collect phase). Each entry's `sample_count` must reach `min_samples_required` before the gate applies its +10% tolerance hard-fail. Until then, the entry is treated as WARN-only. Schema is intentionally identical to .github/bench-baselines/perf_baseline.json so compare_baseline.py can ingest both via the same parser. The `ns_median` slot stores peak RSS in KiB (the gate compares relative %, units cancel).
update_policy: main-branch push bench.yml job auto-refreshes ns_median (= peak RSS KiB) and increments sample_count. Manual edits are discouraged except to add/remove fixtures. When a fixture is intentionally changed (algorithmic change in the .td source), reset its sample_count to 0 and document the reason in `notes`.

rss_peak_rss_arith.notes: populated by scripts/bench/update_baseline.py on main push; arith-only baseline (interpreter static memory floor)

rss_peak_rss_list.notes: populated by scripts/bench/update_baseline.py on main push; List/BuchiPack Arc/try_unwrap COW refcount path

rss_peak_rss_string.notes: populated by scripts/bench/update_baseline.py on main push; Str primitive allocation + Repeat path
